Table 1: Comparisson time, data and recovery time efficiency on: A) semantic Fashion MNIST data stream [0, 2, 4, 7] → [1, 3, 5], B) semantic Fashion MNIST data stream [1, 3, 5] → [0, 2, 4, 7], C) sudden MNIST data stream (0.0 → 0.5), D) sudden MNIST data stream (0.5 → 0.0).
Figure 1: The idea of UIL (Unlearned and Iteratively trained cLassifier)
